scenarios.title: Damage from Unauthorized Repair
scenarios.description: iPhone stopped functioning after a third-party repair shop replaced the battery.

policy_references.snippet: The Plan does not apply to damage caused by service (including upgrades and expansions) if such was performed by anyone who is not a representative of Apple or an Apple Authorized Service Provider (AASP).

scenarios.reasoning: Since the damage resulted from a repair performed by a non-authorized provider, coverage is excluded under section 4.2(ii)(d). No service fee applies and the claim does not count toward the ADH limit.

scenarios.title: Normal Wear and Tear on Charging Port
scenarios.description: Charging port is loose and unreliable after two years of daily use, with no accidental event.

policy_references.snippet: The Plan does not apply to defects caused by normal wear and tear or which is otherwise due to normal aging of the product.

scenarios.reasoning: Issues from normal wear and tear are specifically excluded under section 4.2(vii). The claim is not eligible for coverage, no service fee applies, and it does not count toward the ADH limit.
